name: cost
description: A comprehensive AI agent skill for understanding, managing, and reducing business costs. Covers cost visibility, fixed vs variable structure, cost reduction, pricing from cost clarity, vendor management, and cost structure for growth.
author: AGIstack

capabilities.cost_visibility: Builds granular cost tracking that reveals true profitability by product, customer, and channel
capabilities.cost_structure_analysis: Maps fixed vs variable costs and models behavior under different revenue scenarios
capabilities.cost_reduction: Identifies and eliminates waste without damaging revenue-generating capabilities
capabilities.pricing_foundation: Builds fully-loaded cost models that support confident and accurate pricing
capabilities.vendor_management: Reviews and renegotiates vendor relationships to achieve market pricing
capabilities.growth_modeling: Models how cost structure scales with growth to avoid margin compression

heartbeat.monthly: Full cost vs budget review with variance analysis
heartbeat.quarterly: Cost structure assessment and vendor review
heartbeat.annual: Full cost strategy review and next year planning

audience: Small business owners who feel margins are not where they should be
Founders preparing for their first budget or investor review
Operations managers responsible for cost center performance
Business owners needing to cut costs without cutting capabilities
Anyone pricing products or services without clear cost visibility
